# AAA — Control Plane / Agent Cockpit
> React 19 cockpit + A2A mesh gateway. Operator surface for the 7-organ arifOS federation.
> Port: 3001. License: AGPL-3.0. Status: OPERATIONAL. Version: 2026.07.01.
> Transport: JSON-RPC unified · ΔS ≤ 0 · all 7 organs healthy.

## Quick Context
- **What:** Operator dashboard + A2A message broker for the 7-organ arifOS federation
- **Role:** OPERATES missions — queues HOLDs, routes A2A messages, displays state
- **Federation:** AAA shows. arifOS judges. A-FORGE executes. Arif controls.
- **Transport:** JSON-RPC unified · ΔS ≤ 0
- **Ingress:** Direct A-record → aaa.arif-fazil.com (Caddy → localhost:3001)
- **Stack:** React 19 + Vite 8 + Tailwind 4 + Radix UI + Express A2A gateway

## Federation Organs (7 live · as of 2026-07-01)
| Organ | Port | Role | MCP Tools |
|-------|------|------|-----------|
| arifOS | 8088 | Constitutional kernel — F1-F13, 888 JUDGE, VAULT999 | 13 canonical |
| A-FORGE | 7071/:7072 | Execution shell — build, deploy, forge, MCP gateway | 40+ |
| GEOX | 8081 | Earth intelligence — wells, seismic, petrophysics, basin | 18 canonical |
| WEALTH | 18082 | Capital intelligence — NPV, IRR, EMV, conservation, flow | 23 |
| WELL | 18083 | Vitality mirror — readiness, homeostasis, dignity | 21 |
| AAA | 3001 | Cockpit / identity / A2A gateway (this surface) | 9 |
| VAULT999 | — | Immutable audit ledger — sealed past, hash-chained | — |

## Key Files
- README.md — Full human-readable narrative (849 lines)
- AGENTS.md — Agent rules, build/test commands
- GENESIS/013_AAA_MANDATE.md — Constitutional mandate
- CONTEXT.md — Live organ state

## Frontend (React SPA)
- src/Cockpit.tsx — Main dashboard (autonomy bands, organ health, vault)
- src/App.tsx — App shell with routing
- src/components/cockpit/ — Cockpit panels
- src/components/ui/ — Radix UI primitives
- src/gateway/ — A2A message gateway, agent discovery
- src/hooks/ — React hooks for federation state
- src/ai/ — AI integration layer
- src/adapter/ — Federation data adapters
- src/lib/ — Shared utilities
- src/seed/ — Seed data

## A2A Gateway (Express)
- a2a-server/server.js — Production A2A server (standalone, no build step)
- a2a-server/vault.js — VAULT999 read bridge
- a2a-server/agent-cards/ — Federation agent identity cards (5 warga + 7 external)
- registries/ — forge_instruments.yaml, agent registry

## Build & Test
- Install:  npm install
- Dev:     npm run dev           (Vite dev server)
- Build:   npm run build         (Vite production build, ~1.25s)
- Lint:    npm run lint          (ESLint)
- Start A2A: node a2a-server/server.js   (port 3001)
- Dev A2A:  npm run a2a:server           (tsx watch)
- Health:  curl http://127.0.0.1:3001/health
- Deploy:  npm run build && systemctl restart aaa-a2a

## A2A Server Endpoints
GET  /health                           — Liveness probe
GET  /.well-known/agent-card.json      — AAA agent card
POST /tasks                            — A2A task submission
GET  /api/agents                       — Agent registry

## HEXAGON Warga (5 constitutional agents)
333-AGI (Δ MIND) · 555-ASI (Ω HEART) · 888-APEX (ΦΙ JUDGE) · A-AUDIT (observer) · A-ARCHIVE (vault)

## Agent Cards (a2a-server/agent-cards/)
333-AGI · 555-ASI · 888-APEX · A-AUDIT · A-ARCHIVE · hermes-asi · 777-forge
+ aaa-architect · aaa-auditor · aaa-engineer · antigravity · hermes-ops

## Boundaries (NEVER)
- NEVER adjudicate (AAA displays, arifOS judges)
- NEVER auto-approve a HOLD (AAA queues, Arif approves)
- NEVER claim execution authority (AAA routes, A-FORGE executes)
- NEVER fabricate organ health status — probe live or show UNKNOWN
- NEVER hide a HOLD from the operator queue
